if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND n.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND n.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyNotice :: selectById */ n.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_nt.code_label AS notice_type_cd_nm FROM sy_notice n LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = n.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_nt ON cd_nt.code_grp = 'NOTICE_TYPE' AND cd_nt.code_value = n.notice_type_cd WHERE n.notice_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyNotice :: selectList */ n.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_nt.code_label AS notice_type_cd_nm FROM sy_notice n LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = n.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_nt ON cd_nt.code_grp = 'NOTICE_TYPE' AND cd_nt.code_value = n.notice_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyNotice :: selectPageList */ n.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_nt.code_label AS notice_type_cd_nm FROM sy_notice n LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = n.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_nt ON cd_nt.code_grp = 'NOTICE_TYPE' AND cd_nt.code_value = n.notice_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(n.*) /* base.sy :: SyNotice :: selectPageCount */ FROM sy_notice n
